name: shopify-admin-mcp-dev
description: MCP server for the Shopify Admin GraphQL API using asset-backed code mode

scripts.deploy: npm run build:search-assets && wrangler deploy --env staging
scripts.deploy:prod: npm run build:search-assets && wrangler deploy --env production
scripts.check: npm run build:search-assets && npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test
